=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToFn_fetch.ts ---
// refactor: 4:30-4:31
// @effect-v3

export async function getUserpipe(N)ame(userId: string) {
  const user = await fetch(`https://api.example.com/users/${userId}`)
  const userData = await user.json()
  return userData.name
}


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Rewrite to Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToFn_fetch.ts ---
// refactor: 4:30-4:31
// @effect-v3

export function getUserName(userId: string) {
    return Effect.gen(function* () {
        const user = yield* Effect.promise(() => fetch(`https://api.example.com/users/${userId}`));
        const userData = yield* Effect.promise(() => user.json());
        return userData.name;
    });
}


=== [R1] Refactor 2: "Rewrite to Effect.gen with failures" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToFn_fetch.ts ---
// refactor: 4:30-4:31
// @effect-v3

export class Error1 extends Data.TaggedError("Error1")<{
    cause: unknown;
}> {}

export class Error2 extends Data.TaggedError("Error2")<{
    cause: unknown;
}> {}

export function getUserName(userId: string) {
    return Effect.gen(function* () {
        const user = yield* Effect.tryPromise({ try: () => fetch(`https://api.example.com/users/${userId}`), catch: cause => new Error1({ cause }) });
        const userData = yield* Effect.tryPromise({ try: () => user.json(), catch: cause => new Error2({ cause }) });
        return userData.name;
    });
}


=== [R1] Refactor 3: "Rewrite to Effect.fn" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToFn_fetch.ts ---
// refactor: 4:30-4:31
// @effect-v3

export const getUserName = Effect.fn("getUserName")(function* (userId: string) {
    const user = yield* Effect.promise(() => fetch(`https://api.example.com/users/${userId}`));
    const userData = yield* Effect.promise(() => user.json());
    return userData.name;
});


=== [R1] Refactor 4: "Rewrite to Effect.fn with failures" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToFn_fetch.ts ---
// refactor: 4:30-4:31
// @effect-v3

export class Error1 extends Data.TaggedError("Error1")<{
    cause: unknown;
}> {}

export class Error2 extends Data.TaggedError("Error2")<{
    cause: unknown;
}> {}

export const getUserName = Effect.fn("getUserName")(function* (userId: string) {
    const user = yield* Effect.tryPromise({ try: () => fetch(`https://api.example.com/users/${userId}`), catch: cause => new Error1({ cause }) });
    const userData = yield* Effect.tryPromise({ try: () => user.json(), catch: cause => new Error2({ cause }) });
    return userData.name;
});


=== [R1] Refactor 5: "Toggle return type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToFn_fetch.ts ---
// refactor: 4:30-4:31
// @effect-v3

export async function getUserName(userId: string): Promise<any> {
  const user = await fetch(`https://api.example.com/users/${userId}`)
  const userData = await user.json()
  return userData.name
}
